publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-07-22 18:40:34 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Ithaca Video Festival media collection

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Rose Goldsen Archive of New Media Art

did.physdesc: Memorex and u-matic format video cassettes
did.abstract: Videotapes from the screening program of the annual touring video festival.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Ithaca Video Festival was founded in Ithaca, New York in 1975 under the direction of Philip Mallory Jones.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Videotapes from the screening program of the annual touring video festival.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ithaca Video Festival Media Collection, #8235. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on our Reproductions & Permissions page.

did.unittitle: 3rd Annual Ithaca Video Festival Program #2

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Eva Maier, "Crystal Palace Tape," 03:45, b/w Diane Spodarek, "Milk," 9:00, b/w John Orentlicher, "You Send Me," 10:00, b/w Fred Simon, "First Memories," 7:00, b/w Tomiyo Sasaki, "Dec. 10, 1976," 14:00, b/w

did.unittitle: 3rd Annual Ithaca Video Festival Program #3

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: "Laurie McDonald," Dying Swan," 02:42, b/w Dennis Hlynsky, "A New Tape," 02:00, color Tobe J. Carey, "Road Kills," 16:00, color Bill Viola, "Migrations," 10:00, color Kroy DeyRubin, "Curiosity Killed the Cat," 20:00, b/w

did.unittitle: 4th Annual Ithaca Video Festival Tape #1-1

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Edin Velez, "On the Road to Atitlan," 09:00, b/w Vibke Sorensen, "Fibird," 05:40, color Karen Simon-Petersen, "Break-Away," 08:00, color Tobe Carey, "A Small Self-Portrait," 05:00, b/w Steven King, "60, 1/60," 04:00, b/w Ann Eugenia Volkes, "Sheridan Square," 20:00, b/w

did.unittitle: 4th Annual Ithaca Video Festival Tape #5-1

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Bill Viola, "Sweet Light," 10:00, color Laurie McDonald, "Minute Waltz," 02:30, color Diane Spodarek, "I've Heard That Before," 05:00, color Diane Spodarek, "Save the Sixties," 05:00, b/w Firzgerald/Sanborn, "Exchange in Three Parts," 30:00, color Ernest Gueslla, "Dude Defending a Stare-Case," 03:00, b/w Michael Moser, "Movement Study #1," 03:30, color

did.unittitle: 5th Annual Ithaca Video Festival Tape # A-3

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: John Orentlicher, "Sometime in September," 13:00 Steve Kolpan, "Untitled Morning Ritual," 09:00 Reeves/Hilton, "Thousands Watch," 07:00 Bill and Esti Marpet, "Pyrennes Portrait," 15:42 Ernest Gusella, "Facial Treatments," 03:55 Ernest Gusella, "Iris," 03:20

did.unittitle: 5th Annual Ithaca Video Festival Tape # A-5

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Peter D'Agostino, "Coming and Going: Paris (Metro)," 05:00 Mitchell Kriegman, "Always Late," 10:10 Fitzgerald/Sanborn, "Interpolation," 28:30

did.unittitle: 6th Annual Ithaca Video Festival Series A Tape #2

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Collectavision, "As A Public Service," 18:00 Steina, "Bad," 04:00 Alan Powell and Connie Coleman, "Advance Riding Bowl," 05:00 Bill Viola, "Chott E Djerid," 28:00

did.unittitle: 6th Annual Ithaca Video Festival Series A Tape #3

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Doris Chase, "Jazz Dance," 04:00 Katheryn Kanehiro, "Shutters: Morning I & II," 04:00 Tom Freebairn and Winston Tong, "Bound Feet," 14:00 Peer Bode, "Apple(s)," 04:00 Wright / Craig / MacAdams / Olsen, "California 1," 29:00

did.unittitle: 6th Annual Ithaca Video Festival Series A Tape #4

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Twin Art, "Instant This - Instant That," 04:00 Lyn Tiefenbacher and Dave Pentecost, "Bikers' Wedding," 07:00 William Charette, "Mixed Bag," 08:00 Laurie McDonald, "Water, Wind and the Record of the Rocks," 10:00 Ernest Gusella, "The Exquisite Corpse," 08:00 Pier Marton, "Tapes," 18:00

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: Adair / Robins, "Live from Lunds," 08:30 Steina, "Selected Treecuts," 05:35 Shalom Gorewitz, "Measures of Volatility," 06:00 John Sturgeon, "2 Aspects," 04:10 Fitzgerals / Sanborn, "Similar Nature," 08:00 Gary Hill, "Around & About," 04:45 Atcheley / Metcalfe, "Crime Time Comic Steel & Flesh," 12:00

scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: "Cage Spot," 00:30 "Leaving the 20th Century," 10:40 "Shifts," 10:00 "Boney," 7:00 "Zane/Jones Spot," 00:30 "We Do Not Have Electricity When I Was A Boy," 07:00 "Tongues," 19:55

scopecontent.p: Contents of tape: "Reich Spot," 00:30 "Ambassadors of Another Persuassion," 10:00 "Phillips Spot," 00:30 "Excerpt," 09:00 "Anderson Spot," 00:30 "Plastic Dance," 03:30 "Wind Falls," 21:00 "Paik Spot," 00:30
